justification.headline: Margin Expansion Opportunity
justification.detailed_reasoning: Kroger prices ($7.99) are higher than ours ($7.20) by 9.9%. A 11.0% surcharge captures margin while remaining competitive.

justification.headline: Competitive Pressure Detected
justification.detailed_reasoning: Our price ($11.00) exceeds Kroger's ($9.99) by 10.1%. Applying a 9.2% discount brings us level with the competitor and protects market share.
